metadata.description: Enterprise guardrails for agentic tools (Claude Code, Cowork): CRUA file safety, agent workspace, sync-aware protection for OneDrive/Drive/Dropbox.

plugins.name: agentic-guardrails
plugins.description: Nothing is ever destroyed: deletion redirected to a reversible archive, pre-image snapshots on every write, checkout/publish workflow for Office documents, placeholder/stub protection in cloud-synced folders, and policy-driven command and content blocking.
